title: Halo gamma-ray excess and minimal dark matter model
core_signal: Galactic halo gamma-ray excess can be fit by multiple models

constraint_structure.description: Relic abundance, indirect detection, direct detection, and astrophysical bounds narrow parameter space
constraint_structure.result: Degeneracy remains in m_DM (~400–800 GeV) and coupling parameters

mapping.interpretation: constraints act as selection gates but do not uniquely identify solution without independent structure
mapping.45_degree_gate: signal > noise when constraints are sufficiently independent
